templates.purpose: Internal planning for long-form or trailer motion pieces: world, script, shots, audio briefs, and safety framing before any production spend.
production_steps: Shot list and poster copy prompts (no IP theft)

required_evidence.description: Music, stock, talent, and third-party clip clearance plan or placeholder budget.
Any on-screen stats or endorsements backed by source notes or marked as fictional.
Signed-off checklist that public-facing claims avoid AGI, infinite power, and uncited superlatives.

safety_checks: No uncited comparative superiority in public cuts
No depiction of minors without policy review if applicable
No autonomous deploy language in production docs
blocked_without_human_gate: Final colour and audio master for distribution
recommended_verification: Legal or rights counsel when budget crosses policy threshold

templates.purpose: Structured internal brief for multi-channel campaigns with evidence-first claims and AMK-gated external launch.

required_evidence.description: Each customer-facing claim mapped to proof artefact or softened copy.
Where price or tier appears, cross-check commercial docs and entitlement catalog posture.
AMK project indicators and Go/No-Go advisory pass before public launch.

safety_checks: No pricing or billing copy changes without AMK owner
blocked_without_human_gate: Changing live SKU or checkout strings
Press release with financial forward-looking statements

templates.purpose: Single-product landing narrative and structure plan; implementation stays in engineering and design lanes with human sign-off.
production_steps: Section outline: problem, approach, proof, pricing teaser (if any), FAQ
Safety pass on superlatives and futures

required_evidence.description: Captures or Loom plan tied to current build, dated.
Data collected on page matches published privacy posture.
If prices shown, values verified against authoritative source with owner initials.

safety_checks: No medical or therapeutic claims unless licensed review
No children-specific targeting without COPPA-style review path
No live API keys or secrets in mock HTML
recommended_verification: npm run verify:web or project-specific web readiness script when applicable
AMK indicator row update as advisory only

templates.purpose: Long-form instructional or narrative PDF planning with versioning and export hygiene.
inputs: Tooling versions the doc must match
Trademark and third-party logo usage rules

required_evidence.description: Subject-matter owner sign-off on procedures that affect safety or data.
Product version numbers embedded in doc match release manifest.
Third-party diagrams and quotes carry correct attribution.

safety_checks: No instructions that encourage bypassing security controls
No embedded active scripts in PDF where policy forbids
blocked_without_human_gate: Regulated industries packaging without specialist review
recommended_verification: npm run verify:md on extracted markdown if used
Print or PDF accessibility spot check

templates.purpose: Internal prototype plan for tools or dashboards: flows, data boundaries, and risk class before build tickets.
inputs: Data classes touched (PII, payment, health, none)
Success metrics that avoid dark patterns
production_steps: Risk class label per Z autonomy policy

required_evidence.description: Written classification for each field shown or stored.
Short abuse case list for operator review.
If AMK indicators referenced, mapping is advisory not permission.

safety_checks: No silent cross-project data bridges in mockups
No billing side-effects in prototype narrative
Charter note if any external API appears in future phases
recommended_verification: npm run z:car2 on overlapping modules when code exists

templates.purpose: Compose-ready briefs for composers or licensed libraries with mood, tempo, stems, and clearance path.
production_steps: Mood and reference track list (licensed listening only)
Clearance path choice: original, library, or commission

required_evidence.description: Chosen library or composer agreement status.
Sonic palette constraints from brand doc if any.
Captions or visual rhythm notes if audio carries meaning for UX.

safety_checks: No uncleared samples in shipped mixes
No subliminal or harmful frequency claims
output_assets: Reference playlist index (IDs not files if rights uncertain)
blocked_without_human_gate: Final master publish to public channels
Sync license for broadcast or film festival
recommended_verification: npm run z:omnai for claim language in accompanying marketing

templates.purpose: Partner or investor pack outlining vision, traction, and risk with disciplined language; no securities advice.
production_steps: Narrative arc: problem, insight, solution, traction
Unit economics or pricing posture (reference docs only)
Data room index (no secrets in drafts)

required_evidence.description: Each numeric traction claim has dated source file or query export.
Securities and forward-looking language screened by qualified counsel when required.
Live vs planned features labeled; no AGI or infinite-power slides.

safety_checks: No misstatement of charter or bridge status
Pricing slides align with entitlement policy metadata, not hub execution
blocked_without_human_gate: Any subscription or billing term changes
recommended_verification: npm run z:susbv when commercial numbers appear
